title: Own Comfort
description: Incredible modpack for a comfortable game in vanilla Minecraft without bugs, lags and freezes.
body:
Incredible modpack for a comfortable game in vanilla Minecraft without bugs, lags and freezes.

This modpack was created for comfortable game play and video recording. Visual and sound effects, useful utility mods (f.e. Where is it, Enchantment Descriptions, etc.), and a plenty of optimization mods.

## Overview
[![Overview](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimg.youtube.com%2Fvi%2FwZKdgYn8ywI%2Fhqdefault.jpg&n=-1)](https://youtu.be/wZKdgYn8ywI)

## Can I use it to record videos?

Of course! Icreated this modpack with that in mind, so it even includes ReplayMod. There are a few mods that can improve the video quality.

## What kind of mods are there?
### Visuals
 - Fresh Animations + Fresh Dungeons
 - CameraOverhaul
 - Falling Leaves
 - Eating Animation
 - Not Enough Animations
 - LambDynamicLights
 - Wakes

### Audio improvement
 - AmbientSounds
 - Presence Footsteps

## Included shaders
 - Rethinking Voxels
 - Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
 - BSL Shaders
